hero.subtitle: Lightning-fast architectures designed to capture leads and outshine the competition.

services.headline: I don't charge by the hour. I charge for value, speed, and clean code that converts. Pick your foundation.

items.title: The Starter Package

items.title: The Growth Package
items.subtitle: Designed to convert. Ideal for growing businesses running ad campaigns. Includes CRO and integrations.

items.subtitle: A complete digital foundation. Multi-page websites with Headless CMS so you can edit content easily.

partnership.headline: You design the experience. I build the engine.
partnership.description: Stop fighting with page builders and technical limits. You focus on creating stunning designs in Figma, and I will translate them into lightning-fast, high-converting code. Let's deliver premium digital products together.

pillars.title: Pixel-Perfect Development
pillars.description: Your Figma file is my blueprint. Every margin, typography, and animation is respected.

pillars.title: Zero Tech Headaches
pillars.description: I handle modern frameworks (Astro/Next.js), Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, and flawless responsive behavior.

pillars.title: White-Label Delivery
pillars.description: I work as your technical partner in the shadows. You own the client relationship, I make sure the code is flawless.

hero.tagline: ONE-PAGE SITE · LIVE IN A WEEK
hero.titleBold: Turn visitors into booked clients — without touching code.
hero.titleLight: A custom one-page site, handed to you in 5 days, that you can edit yourself.
hero.subtitle: Designed for yoga studios, retreats and solo founders tired of Wix templates who want something that looks like their brand — not everyone else's. You update the words, I protect the design.

features.title: Ready to get clients

blocks.outcome: A calm, 4-page German-language site with a clear 'book an appointment' path. Warm, professional, and easy for her to maintain.

blocks.challenge: Bookings happened in Instagram DMs. No inquiry funnel, no tracking, no way to scale paid campaigns or measure what was working — every lost DM was a lost retreat booking.
blocks.outcome: A German-language landing page on Astro with inquiry form, Meta pixel + conversion events, and SEO set up from day one. When the site went live, the first retreat sold out.

founder.name: Francisco Cortez
founder.message: No agency layers, no juniors, no handoffs — you get the person who'll actually build it. From the first call to launch, and the years after.

hero.titleBold: Your site, taken care of — by the person who built it.
hero.titleLight: Updates, fixes, and small improvements, handled for you.
hero.subtitle: You don't need another tool to learn or a support ticket to write. Send me a WhatsApp or an email and the change is live — usually the same day. I keep your site fast, safe and up to date, so you stay focused on the work that actually pays the bills.

features.title: Fast Edge Hosting
features.description: Your site is deployed globally on edge networks. This guarantees 99.9% uptime and lightning-fast load times for your users, regardless of their geographical location.

features.title: Proactive Security
features.description: Constant dependency updates and threat monitoring. I patch vulnerabilities before they become a problem, ensuring your data and your users remain strictly protected.

features.title: Performance Monitoring
features.description: I track your Core Web Vitals continuously. If a new content update or third-party script degrades your Lighthouse score, I detect it and optimize it immediately.

features.title: Priority Support
features.description: Get a direct line to your developer. Need to integrate a new tracking pixel, adjust a layout, or consult on technical SEO? Consider me your in-house technical partner.

finalCta.headline: Keep your engine running at 100%

designerBanner.text: Let's turn your Figma designs into lightning-fast, pixel-perfect code.

hero.headline: I future-proof brands for the AI search era with high-performance digital architectures.

items.title: The Strategy
items.description: Search has evolved. I map out your visibility not just for Google, but for AI engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity. I focus on entity optimization to ensure your brand becomes a cited authority.

items.title: The Execution
items.description: I build lightning-fast, mobile-first platforms. Every pixel is optimized for conversions, and every line of code is structured with Schema markup so AI crawlers can easily extract and cite your data.

items.title: The Growth
items.description: You get a digital asset that ranks higher in traditional search, gets recommended by AI assistants, and turns that high-quality, targeted traffic into loyal clients.

values.title: I engineer for AI retrieval
values.description: If an AI crawler cannot read your site, you don't exist in the new web. I deliver clean architecture, structured data, and ultra-fast load times so you are always the primary source.

values.title: I design conversion funnels
values.description: As AI answers more questions directly, the traffic that does reach your site is highly qualified. I build frictionless user experiences that guide these high-intent visitors straight to checkout or contact.

values.title: I build resilient partnerships
values.description: The digital landscape changes daily. Whether adapting to new LLM algorithms, optimizing for AI Overviews, or launching a new campaign, I act as your dedicated technical growth partner for the long haul.

sections.heading: 1. Privacy at a Glance
sections.body: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you. Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator.

sections.heading: 2. Hosting and Infrastructure
sections.body:
Vercel: Our website is hosted by Vercel (Vercel Inc., USA). Data is processed based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR to ensure secure and efficient provision of our services. We have concluded a data processing agreement (DPA) with the provider.

Cloudflare: To secure and optimize loading speeds, we use the Content Delivery Network (CDN) provided by Cloudflare Inc. This serves our legitimate interest in a stable and secure website performance according to Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

sections.heading: 3. Controller (Responsible Party)
sections.body:
The party responsible for data processing on this website is:

Jose Francisco Cortez Moreno
Klarastr. 8
12459 Berlin
Germany

  • Email: legal@base-pages.com
  • Phone: +491756975657

sections.heading: 4. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.body:
As a user, you have the following rights at any time:

  • Right to information about your stored data.
  • Right to demand the correction or deletion of your data.
  • Right to revoke any previously given consent for data processing.
  • Right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
  • Right to data portability in a standard format.

sections.heading: 5. Analysis and Marketing Tools
sections.body:
We use analysis and tracking tools only after receiving your express consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR):

  • Google Analytics & Tag Manager: Used to analyze user behavior (Google Ireland Ltd.).
  • Meta Pixel: Used to track ad conversions and for retargeting purposes (Meta Platforms Ireland Ltd.).
  • TikTok Pixel: Used to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns (TikTok Technology Ltd.).

sections.heading: 6. Third-Party Communication Services
sections.body:
Cal.com: For appointment scheduling, we process the data you provide for the purpose of contract fulfillment or pre-contractual measures (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).

Resend: For technical delivery of transactional emails (e.g., form confirmations), we utilize Resend Labs Inc.

Zoom: For video conferencing and online meetings, we use Zoom (Zoom Video Communications, Inc.). This is based on our legitimate interest in efficient communication (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) or contract fulfillment (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).

sections.heading: 7. Legal Notice (Impressum)
sections.body:
Information according to § 5 TMG:

Jose Francisco Cortez Moreno
Klarastr. 8
12459 Berlin

Person responsible for content according to § 18 MStV:
Jose Francisco Cortez Moreno

EU Dispute Resolution: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: Person responsible for content according to § 18 Abs. 2 MStV
Dispute Resolution
sections.body:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: Liability for Content
sections.body: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 Para. 1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
